hero_subtitle: SFTY Business connects provider outputs and jurisdictional policies to create a cohesive, audit-ready reporting workflow tailored for Singapore-regulated digital asset compliance teams.

problem_title: Compliance review slows with disconnected workflows
problem_description: Singapore-facing compliance teams face delays when reporting workflows rely on fragmented provider outputs and scattered evidence. This creates challenges in maintaining audit-ready cases and meeting jurisdiction-specific regulatory obligations efficiently.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies provider outputs, case evidence, regulatory updates and reviewer actions into a single workflow tailored for Singapore compliance teams managing jurisdiction-specific reporting obligations efficiently.
workflow_title: From regulatory updates to reporting workflows
workflow_description: SFTY maps jurisdiction-specific regulatory changes through internal rule updates, case creation, evidence preservation and reporting for Singapore-facing compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented reports. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific outputs into structured cases, decisions, evidence and reporting workflows to support compliance teams handling Singapore regulatory requirements efficiently.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing Singapore reporting workflows with structured provider orchestration, audit evidence preservation and enterprise-grade deployment control from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Singapore compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps Singapore compliance teams structure jurisdiction-specific workflows, connecting regulatory rule triggers, case management, evidence, and reporting into one operational compliance layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support Singapore reporting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures reporting workflows by linking Singapore-specific rules, Travel Rule events, case files, and regulatory reports into connected, auditable operational processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, provider outputs, and evidence packages to support audit readiness and regulatory reviews in Singapore compliance contexts.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening providers into a controlled compliance workflow without replacing existing tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but turns their outputs into structured reviews, decisions, cases, evidence, and Singapore-specific compliance reports.
final_title: Structure audit-ready reporting workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Singapore-specific provider outputs into controlled cases, evidence and compliance reporting workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
